summary.intent: Fix a UI bug where clicking on a session card in the left panel required multiple clicks to actually select it.
summary.outcome: Fixed the click propagation issue by moving stopPropagation from a full-width wrapper div to the Close button element itself, ensuring single clicks reliably select sessions.

repo: Session browser UI is implemented in crates/web/src/assets/js/page-browser.js
The left panel has two tabs: Live (active sessions) and History (past sessions with closed/lost badges)

code.finding: The Close button's wrapper div had stopPropagation applied to it and spanned the full card bottom width, causing clicks anywhere in that row to be consumed before reaching the card selection handler. Fix: apply stopPropagation only on the button element itself.

workflow: Lint step is run before committing and pushing changes

friction: stopPropagation placed on a full-width container div instead of the specific interactive element caused subtle click-handling bugs that required multiple clicks to work around
